findings.detail: Only 3 color palettes, so it may feel limited if I want a stronger brand look.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a quick confirmation or reply after I send a chat message so I know it worked.

findings.detail: The template choices are a bit sparse with just 4 options, which could make it harder to find a close match quickly.
findings.proposed_solution: Add a few more template options to make it easier to find a style that fits my business.

findings.detail: The chat sent my message, but there was no visible response, so it may feel like nothing happened.
findings.proposed_solution: Offer a little more guidance on what each palette changes, so I can choose faster without guessing.

warnings.detail: Only 3 color palettes, so it may feel limited if I want a stronger brand look.
